default_policy: Default run refines only the top feedback-screening schedule per large case with the configured branch_recovery max_nfev cap; no multistart expansion is enabled.
threshold_dimensional_caveat: The reported error is sqrt((||dr||/position_scale)^2 + (||dv||/velocity_scale)^2). Dimensional rows are component upper-bound interpretations when the other component is zero, not flight-dynamics targeting tolerances.
claim_limits: This is a targeted diagnostic for feedback-screening winners, not a full branch-refined enumeration.
The larger online-search rows remain screening evidence unless branch-refined feasible seeds are demonstrated.
Optimizer status is reported separately from threshold pass/fail.
All-mask worst is a diagnostic over outage masks not selected for refinement.
